<!-- manuscript/figures/_fig-01-example.qmd ----
     Include partial, not a page - see tables/_tbl-01-example.qmd for why
     the leading underscore matters, why this file is kept thin, and why
     the explicit store= below is needed. -->

```{r}
#| label: fig-01-example
#| fig-cap: "Example figure generated from the pipeline."
library(ggplot2)
targets::tar_read(fig_01_example, store = here::here("_targets"))
```
